GpuProjectExec: expr=[100 * CAST(sum(CASE WHEN part.p_type LIKE Utf8("PROMO%") THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount ELSE Int64(0) END)@0 AS Float64) / CAST(sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)@1 AS Float64) as promo_revenue]
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN part.p_type LIKE Utf8("PROMO%") THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN part.p_type LIKE Utf8("PROMO%") THEN lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuProjectExec: expr=[l_extendedprice@1 * (Some(1),20,0 - l_discount@2) as __common_expr_1, p_type@0 as p_type]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(p_partkey@0, l_partkey@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([p_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_partkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_shipdate@3 >= 1995-09-01 AND l_shipdate@3 < 1995-10-01, projection=[0, 1, 2]
                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=1280
GpuProjectExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=40
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=32, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=64
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=48, estimate_output_bytes=32, estimate_cost=80
        GpuProjectExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=48, estimate_cost=112
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=64, estimate_output_bytes=64, estimate_cost=128
            GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, estimate_input_bytes=80, estimate_output_bytes=64, estimate_cost=144
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=40
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, estimate_input_bytes=40, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=80
                    GpuFilterExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, estimate_input_bytes=44, estimate_output_bytes=40, estimate_cost=84
                      GpuScanExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=44, estimate_cost=44
